components.name: signal_ingestion
components.notes: Capacity CSV input and external residual handoff are separate from the core grammar engine.

components.name: residual_processing
components.notes: Residual, drift, slew, and envelope computation are isolated in the math module.

components.name: grammar_engine
components.notes: State evaluation and reason-code assignment remain deterministic and separable.

components.name: heuristics_bank
components.notes: The heuristics bank is versioned and independently hash-verifiable.

components.name: artifact_reporting
components.notes: Reporting and figure generation are host-side and std-only.

components.name: integration_wrappers
components.notes: Wrapper paths are additive and transport-agnostic.
